indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: The space provides multiple seating options, including chairs and sofas, which can accommodate solo computer work.

indicators.name: adequate lighting
indicators.rationale: The ceiling lights provide sufficient illumination for computer work.

indicators.name: open space
indicators.rationale: The open layout might lead to distractions from other people in the space.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for solo computer work due to its seating arrangement and adequate lighting, but it may be distracting due to its open layout.
